import React from"react";import coin from'../img/main-icon.png';import goldCoin from'../img/logo.png';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";class Welcome extends React.Component{constructor(){super(...arguments);this.state={count:0,mainImg:coin,welcomeText:'Медная монета'};this.click=()=>{this.setState({count:this.state.count+10},()=>{//после обновление счета вызваем функцию 
this.changePicture();});};this.changePicture=()=>{if(this.state.count>100){this.setState({mainImg:goldCoin,welcomeText:'Золотая монета'});}};}render(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"main",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{className:"welcome",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"welcome-title",children:this.state.welcomeText}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{className:"welcome-img",src:this.state.mainImg,onClick:this.click}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{className:"counter",children:["\u0412\u0430\u0448 \u0441\u0447\u0435\u0442 ",this.state.count]})]})})});}}export default Welcome;
